zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Wake於大約1354年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯時，她的父親Thomas Wake36歲，母親Alice Pateshull21歲。她與Sir Philip Courtenay在英國戴文波德哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1404年3月30日之後在英國戴文艾可謝特，埋葬在英國戴文艾可謝特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Wake于大约1354年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯时，她的父亲Thomas Wake36岁，母亲Alice Pateshull21岁。她与Sir Philip Courtenay在英国戴文波德哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1404年3月30日之后在英国戴文艾可謝特，埋葬在英国戴文艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: Wake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for ‘(man of) the watch’, from Middle English wak, wake ‘wake, vigil, watch, period of guard duty’ (Old English wacu, Old Norse vaka). It alternates with the synonymous Middle English wache (Old English wacce), hence the variant Watch. The surname was also interchangeable with Waite (the equivalent Old French term) which, like Wake, was sometimes translated as Latin vigil ‘(one who is) watchful, alert’. Compare the synonymous Vail . When the bearers had high social status, the surname probably denoted an officer with responsibility for the security of a castle, town, or royal person. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Vail
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French de la veille ‘of the watch, watchman’, with loss of de; compare Wake . There has been some confusion with the topographic name Vale and the nickname Veal .
Scottish: shortened and altered form of McPhail , Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phàil ‘son of Paul’.

variants.name: Waite
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a watchman, either in a town or castle, from Anglo-Norman French waite ‘watchman, member of the watch’ (of ancient Germanic origin; compare Wachter ). In the Middle Ages the town waits typically combined the functions of watchmen and musicians through being trumpeters or pipers. There may also have been some late confusion with White or Wheat .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Wake was born about 1354, in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Thomas Wake, was 36 and her mother, Alice Pateshull, was 21. She married Sir Philip Courtenay in Powderham, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 30 March 1404, in Exeter, Devon, England, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Wake est née environ 1354, à Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wake, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice Pateshull, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Philip Courtenay à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 30 mars 1404, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Wake um 1354 in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Wake 36 und ihre Mutter Alice Pateshull 21. Sie hat in Powderham, Devon, England Sir Philip Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 30. März 1404 in Exeter, Devon, England und wurde in Exeter, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Wake è nata il circa 1354 nel Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Wake, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Alice Pateshull, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Philip Courtenay nel Powderham, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 30 marzo 1404, nel Exeter, Devon, England, e fu sepolta a Exeter, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Wakeが約1354年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリスウオルスで生まれた時，父Thomas Wakeは36歳，母Alice Pateshullは21歳であった。イギリスデボンポウデルハムでSir Philip Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1404年3月30日以後にイギリスデボンエクセターで死去し，イギリスデボンエクセターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Wake(이)가 대략 1354년 영국 노르섬프토실르 블리스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wake(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Pateshull(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 영국 데폰 파우더함에서 Sir Philip Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1404년 3월 30일 이후 영국 데폰 세터에서 사망했으며 영국 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Wake nasceu aproximadamente 1354, em Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wake, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice Pateshull, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Philip Courtenay em Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 30 de março de 1404, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Wake родилась около 1354 г. в местности блисворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Wake было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Pateshull, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Philip Courtenay в местности поудирам, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 30 марта 1404 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия и была похоронена в местности эксетир, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Wake nació aproximadamente 1354, en Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Wake, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alice Pateshull, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Philip Courtenay en Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 30 de marzo de 1404, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.
